insights.ru: Возраст правителя почти линейно связан с политическим возрастом: r=0.933.
insights.en: Ruler age is tightly aligned with political age: r=0.933.

insights.ru: Чем старше core elite, тем слабее обновление за 5 лет: r=-0.449.
insights.en: Older core elite coincides with weaker 5-year renewal: r=-0.449.

insights.ru: Возраст правителя сильнее совпадает со взвешенным возрастом core elite, чем с простым средним: r=0.822 против r=0.704.
insights.en: Ruler age aligns more strongly with weighted core age than with plain mean age: r=0.822 vs r=0.704.

insights.ru: Число elite-initiated событий связано с максимальной severity: r=0.758. Это текущий событийный сигнал.
insights.en: Elite-initiated event volume is linked with max severity: r=0.758. This is the current event signal.

periods.csv is absent, so periodization is weaker and priors matter more.

selected_family.label: Security-state / faction model
selected_family.description: Event dynamics are driven by security services, military, intelligence, coercive institutions, leader-centered networks, and factional closure.
selected_family.interpretation_template: In {country}, {period}, the recommended model is security-state/faction-based. Event dynamics are likely driven by security factions, leader-centered networks, coercive institutions, and crisis pressure.
selected_family.forecast_template: Forecasts should track security elite share, faction concentration, leader age, war/protest pressure, purge signals, and turnover decline.
warnings: Age may matter mainly through faction closure and security bloc dominance.
